title: malaxis rupestris
intro: Malaxis rupestris, also known as the rock orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Malaxis rupestris include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Malaxis rupestris can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to treat various skin issues.
